'''âw-r-p-n''' ('''kawarpenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vamp|vamp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vamp|vamp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-r-p-n
|-
! Lemma
| kawarpenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwarpenoko|thiwarpenoko]] || [[word:jiwarpenoko|jiwarpenoko]] || [[word:shiwarpenoko|shiwarpenoko]] || [[word:kiwarpenoko|kiwarpenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwarpenoko|thuthuwarpenoko]] || [[word:jujuwarpenoko|jujuwarpenoko]] || [[word:shushuwarpenoko|shushuwarpenoko]] || [[word:kukuwarpenoko|kukuwarpenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwarpenoko|thuwarpenoko]] || [[word:juwarpenoko|juwarpenoko]] || [[word:shuwarpenoko|shuwarpenoko]] || [[word:kuwarpenoko|kuwarpenoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewarpenoko|thewarpenoko]] || [[word:jewarpenoko|jewarpenoko]] || [[word:shewarpenoko|shewarpenoko]] || [[word:kewarpenoko|kewarpenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowarpenoko|thothowarpenoko]] || [[word:jojowarpenoko|jojowarpenoko]] || [[word:shoshowarpenoko|shoshowarpenoko]] || [[word:kokowarpenoko|kokowarpenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowarpenoko|thowarpenoko]] || [[word:jowarpenoko|jowarpenoko]] || [[word:showarpenoko|showarpenoko]] || [[word:kowarpenoko|kowarpenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowarpenoko|thowarpenoko]] || [[word:jowarpenoko|jowarpenoko]] || [[word:showarpenoko|showarpenoko]] || [[word:kowarpenoko|kowarpenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwarpenoko|thĂŠwarpenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwarpenoko|jĂŠwarpenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwarpenoko|shĂŠwarpenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwarpenoko|kĂŠwarpenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawarpenoko|thathawarpenoko]] || [[word:jajawarpenoko|jajawarpenoko]] || [[word:shashawarpenoko|shashawarpenoko]] || [[word:kakawarpenoko|kakawarpenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawarpenoko|thawarpenoko]] || [[word:jawarpenoko|jawarpenoko]] || [[word:shawarpenoko|shawarpenoko]] || [[word:kawarpenoko|kawarpenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawarpenoko|thawarpenoko]] || [[word:jawarpenoko|jawarpenoko]] || [[word:shawarpenoko|shawarpenoko]] || [[word:kawarpenoko|kawarpenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
